generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our NATO allies have been quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden? As a concerned citizen, I've seen how this imbalance puts our national security at risk. We can't afford to be the only ones standing guard. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that leave us vulnerable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
